species: Endogenous retroelements (EREs) constitute about 42% of the human genome
tissue: Widespread and tissue-specific expression of endogenous retroelements in human somatic tissues
disease_state: have been implicated in common human diseases such as autoimmunity and cancer.
sample_source: To assess ERE expression in healthy human tissues
cell_line: in B-lymphoblastoid cell lines (B-LCL) from 16 individuals.
